title: Senior SAP SAC / Datasphere Consultant (German Based)
raw_description:
We have a new freelance opportunity to support a German SAP Consultancy for an SAP SAC / Datasphere Consultant to join a greenfield customer project in Germany.


Role: SAP SAC / Datasphere Consultant
Project Duration: Initial 12 Months (Extension possible)
Location: Remote with occasional on-site near Dusseldorf, Germany
Start Date: ASAP
Language: English required (German a plus)
Workload: Minimum 2 days a week required (Ideally more)


Key Responsibilities:
• Design and develop analytics solutions using SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) for reporting and/or planning scenarios.
• Build and optimize data models and data flows within SAP Datasphere (formerly SAP Data Warehouse Cloud).
• Integrate SAP and non-SAP data sources using SAP BTP / Integration tools where required.
• Collaborate with business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable reporting and planning solutions.
• Support end-to-end delivery including design, development, testing, and deployment.
• Ensure best practices
score_reason: Strong modern SAP stack with SAC and Datasphere, high remote flexibility, and low minimum workload requirement.

title: Senior SAP IBP Consultant / Solution Architect – Planning & Integration
raw_description:
Summary
We are seeking a Senior SAP IBP Consultant / Solution Architect to lead design and optimization of advanced planning processes in SAP IBP within a global transformation program for a Pharmaceutical Manufacturer. The role includes ownership of solution architecture, stakeholder management, and delivery of scalable planning solutions integrated with S/4HANA and cloud technologies.


Tasks & Responsibilities
Lead end-to-end design of SAP IBP solutions (Demand, Supply, S&OP, OBP)
Define architecture and integration concepts (RTI, CI-DS, SDI, APIs)
Conduct requirement assessments and facilitate workshops with business stakeholders
Configure and optimize planning areas, key figures, attributes, and time profiles
Provide guidance to junior consultants and technical teams
Analyze complex planning or integration issues and design sustainable solutions
Ensure documentation quality and knowledge transfer
Support roadmap planning and continuous improvement initiative


Required Skills & Ex
score_reason: Modern SAP tech stack with IBP and S/4HANA integration gets good points, but no premium technologies and appears to be agency-posted.

title: SAP Solution Architect / Chief Consultant – Royalty Management & BRIM Integration
raw_description:
Projektbeschreibung
Wir suchen einen qualifizierten SAP Chief Consultant für die Betreuung und Weiterentwicklung unserer globalen Royalty Management Lösung. Der Fokus liegt auf der technischen und funktionalen Abwicklung von Drittanbieter-Lizenzierungen (3rd Party Licensing) sowie konzerninternen (Intercompany) Abrechnungsprozessen. Die Rolle erfordert eine seltene Expertise an der Schnittstelle zwischen klassischem Finanzwesen (FI/CO), moderner verbrauchsbasierter Abrechnung (BRIM) und spezialisiertem Settlement Management.


Das sind deine Aufgaben:
Design & Architektur: Eigenverantwortliche Erstellung von Fachkonzepten, Analyse und Definition von Geschäftsprozessen im Bereich Royalties.
Implementierung & Customizing: Fachliche Konfiguration und technische Erweiterung (Enhancements) der SAP-Module Settlement Management, SD und BRIM.
End-to-End Verantwortung: Betreuung der gesamten Kette von der Lizenzvertragserstellung über die Validierung bis hin zum Go-Live und Steady-State Support
score_reason: Specialized niche SAP project with BRIM but lacks modern analytics stack and remote flexibility.

 Schwerpunkte sind  Systemführung, gesetzliche Konformität und Integration mit ext. Systemen.
 Wichtig:
 SAP Employee Central Payroll Zertifizierung (oder ECP-Erfahrung)
  Erfahrung mit SAP PY-DE (Deutsche Payroll) inkl. Steuern, Sozialversicherung + gesetzlicher Anforderungen
 Praktische AMS-Erfahrung in Incident-, Problem-, Change- und Service Request-Management
  Kenntnisse der aktuellen deutschen Payroll-Gesetzgebung
 Wesentliche Aufgaben:
 - Konfiguration von Payroll-Schemas, Rules, Wage Types, Infotypes und Time Evaluation
 - End-to-End-Support für Payroll-Läufe, Retro-Aktualisierungen und Korrekturen
 -Level 2/3 Support (Incidents & kleinere Erweiterungen)  


2.)
  LLM AI Engineer mit Hopsworks BI, Fokus Data Scie
score_reason: Points for LLM/AI mention and direct client contact, but loses points for being agency-posted and no remote work specified.

title: SAP FSM Architect (Only Nearshore) (m/f/d)
raw_description:
SAP FSM Architect (Only Nearshore) (m/f/d)

Reference: 872334/1-en
Start: asap
Duration: 6 MM

Main tasks:

As an SAP FSM Architect, you are responsible for the technical stability, further development, and integration of the SAP Field Service Management (FSM) solution. You act as a global key contact within the support organization, design end to end field service processes, and drive innovations such as SAP AI and Fiori based user experiences
Operations and Support
Act as Global Key Contact within the SAP FSM Support Organization to ensure stable operations of the business area
Ensure stability and issue resolution for SnapLogic interfaces
Analyze, coordinate, and resolve incidents and technical issues
Architecture & Solution Development / Take technical ownership of theSAP FSM solution
Design and develop: SAP FSM enhancement, Interfaces, Business rules, Smart Forms
Support S/4HANA projects in implementing end to end field service processes.
Innovation & User Experience / ImplementSA
score_reason: High score due to modern SAP stack including S/4HANA and AI, full remote work, and 6-month duration, though posted by agency.
